data.title: What's Going On With Pineapple Energy Shares Thursday?
data.description: Pineapple Energy stock is trading higher on Thursday after its subsidiary SUNation Energy announced an exclusive partnership with Empire Automotive.

data.title: Celsius Holdings Stock Is Surging Thursday: What's Going On?
data.description: Celsius Holdings Inc (NASDAQ:CELH) shares are trading higher Thursday, bouncing back from steep losses in recent quarters. Here's a look at what's going on.

data.title: FTC Faces Pressure to Block Novo Nordisk-Catalent Merger Over Antitrust Fears
data.description: Concerns are rising as Novo Nordisk's $16.5 billion bid to acquire Catalent faces scrutiny from the FTC. Critics argue the merger could harm competition in the GLP-1 market, potentially driving up prices for obesity and diabetes treatments.

data.title: Nike Upgraded: Analyst Optimistic Despite Lengthy Process And Competitive Challenges
data.description: Truist Securities analyst upgrades Nike to Buy with $97 price target, citing improved leadership, marketing, and wholesale relationships for a potential turnaround.
